panels.title: Exporter Targets Up

targets.expr: sum(up{job="libvirt"})

panels.description: Count of Prometheus scrape targets currently up for the selected libvirt job/compute targets.

panels.title: Selected VMs

targets.expr: count(max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: VM/domain count using libvirt_domain_openstack_info so project, flavor, user, and domain filters apply.

targets.expr: count(libvirt_domain_info_state{job="libvirt",state_desc=~"running|Running"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

count(libvirt_domain_info_state{job="libvirt",state_desc=~"shut ?off|Shut ?off|shutoff|Shutoff|shutdown|Shutdown"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

count(libvirt_domain_info_state{job="libvirt",state_desc=~"paused|Paused|suspended|Suspended"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

count(libvirt_domain_info_state{job="libvirt",state_desc=~"crashed|Crashed|crash.*|Crash.*"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.title: Timed Out Domains

targets.expr: sum(floor((libvirt_domain_timed_out{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})))

panels.description: Domain-level exporter timeouts. Non-zero values usually mean libvirt calls exceeded exporter timeout.

targets.expr: count(count by(host_name) (max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})))

sum((libvirt_domain_info_virtual_cpus{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum((libvirt_domain_info_maximum_memory_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum((libvirt_domain_info_memory_usage_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

panels.title: CPU Used (5m)

targets.expr: sum(rate(libvirt_domain_info_cpu_time_seconds_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Approximate CPU cores consumed across selected domains over the last 5 minutes.

targets.expr: count by (state_desc) (libvirt_domain_info_state{job="libvirt"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.title: Domains by Compute

targets.expr: count by(host_name) (max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Grouped by OpenStack compute host_name from libvirt_domain_openstack_info.

targets.expr: topk(12, count by(project_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

topk(12, sum by(flavor_name) (libvirt_domain_info_virtual_cpus{job="libvirt"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left(flavor_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name, instance_id, flavor_name, user_name, user_id, project_name, project_id) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})))
topk(12, count by(user_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.title: CPU Consumption by Compute

targets.expr: sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_info_cpu_time_seconds_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Per-compute CPU usage in cores derived from libvirt_domain_info_cpu_time_seconds_total. Grouped by OpenStack compute host_name from libvirt_domain_openstack_info.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by(domain, instance_name, host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_info_cpu_time_seconds_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})))

panels.title: Top 10 VMs by vCPU Scheduler Delay

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by(domain, instance_name, host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_vcpu_delay_seconds_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})))

panels.description: Higher values mean vCPUs are spending more time queued and waiting to run.

panels.title: Current Online vCPUs by Compute

targets.expr: sum by(host_name) ((libvirt_domain_vcpu_current{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Grouped by OpenStack compute host_name from libvirt_domain_openstack_info.

panels.title: Aggregate Memory: Usage vs Available vs Usable vs RSS

targets.expr: sum((libvirt_domain_info_memory_usage_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum((libvirt_domain_memory_stats_available_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum((libvirt_domain_memory_stats_usable_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum((libvirt_domain_memory_stats_rss_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

topk(10, (libvirt_domain_memory_stats_used_percent{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum((libvirt_domain_memory_stats_current_balloon_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum((libvirt_domain_memory_stats_unused_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum((libvirt_domain_memory_stats_usable_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum((libvirt_domain_memory_stats_disk_caches_bytes{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})) / 1024^3

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_memory_stats_swap_in_bytes{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_memory_stats_swap_out_bytes{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_memory_stats_major_fault_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_memory_stats_minor_fault_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_memory_stats_hugetlb_pgalloc_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_memory_stats_hugetlb_pgfail_total{job="libvirt"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.title: Network Throughput by Compute

targets.expr: sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_receive_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_transmit_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Grouped by OpenStack compute host_name from libvirt_domain_openstack_info.

panels.title: Top 10 VMs by Total Network Throughput

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by(domain, instance_name, host_name) (((rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_receive_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) + rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_transmit_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m])) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))))

panels.title: Network Packets per Second

targets.expr: sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_receive_packets_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_transmit_packets_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Grouped by OpenStack compute host_name from libvirt_domain_openstack_info.

targets.expr: sum(rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_receive_errors_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_receive_drops_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_transmit_errors_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum(rate(libvirt_domain_interface_stats_transmit_drops_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.title: Disk Throughput by Compute

targets.expr: sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_read_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_write_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Grouped by OpenStack compute host_name from libvirt_domain_openstack_info.

panels.title: Disk IOPS by Compute

targets.expr: sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_read_requests_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_write_requests_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

sum by(host_name) (rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_flush_requests_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left max by (domain, host_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.description: Grouped by OpenStack compute host_name from libvirt_domain_openstack_info.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by(domain, target_device, instance_name, host_name) (((rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_read_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) + rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_write_bytes_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m])) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))))

topk(10, (sum by(domain, target_device, instance_name, host_name) ((rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_read_time_seconds_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))) / clamp_min(sum by(domain, target_device, instance_name, host_name) ((rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_read_requests_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))), 0.001)))

topk(10, (sum by(domain, target_device, instance_name, host_name) ((rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_write_time_seconds_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))) / clamp_min(sum by(domain, target_device, instance_name, host_name) ((rate(libvirt_domain_block_stats_write_requests_total{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"}[5m]) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))), 0.001)))

panels.title: Top Active Domain Job Progress

targets.expr: topk(10, ((100 * ((libvirt_domain_job_info_data_processed_bytes{job="libvirt"} + libvirt_domain_job_info_memory_processed_bytes{job="libvirt"} + libvirt_domain_job_info_file_processed_bytes{job="libvirt"}) / clamp_min((libvirt_domain_job_info_data_total_bytes{job="libvirt"} + libvirt_domain_job_info_memory_total_bytes{job="libvirt"} + libvirt_domain_job_info_file_total_bytes{job="libvirt"}), 1))) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name, project_name, flavor_name, user_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name, project_name, flavor_name, user_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})))

panels.description: Uses libvirt_domain_job_info_* metrics and joins Nova metadata from libvirt_domain_openstack_info on domain + host_name.

targets.expr: topk(10, (libvirt_domain_job_info_time_remaining_seconds{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

topk(10, (libvirt_domain_job_info_time_elapsed_seconds{job="libvirt"}) * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"}))

panels.title: OpenStack VM Inventory / Current State

targets.expr: libvirt_domain_info_state{job="libvirt"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name, instance_id, flavor_name, user_name, user_id, project_name, project_id) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name, instance_id, flavor_name, user_name, user_id, project_name, project_id) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})

panels.description: Inventory-style table from libvirt_domain_openstack_info joined with libvirt_domain_info_state.

panels.title: Block Device Inventory

targets.expr: libvirt_domain_block_stats_info{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$disk"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name, instance_id, flavor_name, user_name, user_id, project_name, project_id) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name, instance_id, flavor_name, user_name, user_id, project_name, project_id) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})

panels.description: Block metadata from libvirt_domain_block_stats_info with OpenStack labels attached.

panels.title: Interface Inventory

targets.expr: libvirt_domain_interface_stats_info{job="libvirt",target_device=~"$nic"} * on(domain, host_name) group_left(instance_name, instance_id, flavor_name, user_name, user_id, project_name, project_id) max by (domain, host_name, instance_name, instance_id, flavor_name, user_name, user_id, project_name, project_id) (libvirt_domain_openstack_info{job="libvirt",host_name=~"$compute",project_name=~"$project",flavor_name=~"$flavor",user_name=~"$user",domain=~"$domain"})

panels.description: Interface metadata from libvirt_domain_interface_stats_info with OpenStack labels attached.

title: OpenStack Libvirt Advanced Dashboard (inovex exporter, exact metric set)
